title: SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Baseline Features Schema v0.1
description: Schema for validating one row object from features_baseline.csv in the SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Track synthetic/sample package. This schema is for public helper use only. It does not define CAIS, does not define Sal-Meter, does not grant compliance, does not validate benchmark performance, and does not create diagnostic, therapeutic, clinical, surveillance, employment, insurance, educational, legal, or eligibility authority.

window_label.description: Synthetic or research-stage feature window label. This is not a diagnosis, not a clinical label, not a Sal-Meter output, and not a CAIS index.

window_start.description: Feature window start timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC-like format.

window_end.description: Feature window end timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC-like format.

synthetic_hrv_index.description: Synthetic HRV-like proxy feature. This is a toy/sample feature only and is not physiological evidence.

synthetic_eda_level.description: Synthetic EDA-like proxy feature. This is a toy/sample feature only and is not physiological evidence.

synthetic_interaction_latency_ms.description: Synthetic interaction latency in milliseconds. This is a toy/sample feature only.

synthetic_human_state_cost_proxy.description: Synthetic Human-State Cost proxy example value. This is a non-diagnostic benchmark construct example only. It is not a medical score, psychiatric score, clinical score, consciousness score, Sal-Meter output, CAIS output, certified benchmark, or human-ranking measure.

note.description: Boundary note. Must not contain participant identifiers, clinical interpretation, Sal-Meter validation claims, or CAIS compliance claims.

raw_human_data_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For public sample data this must be false.

identifiable_data_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For public sample data this must be false.

clinical_data_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For public sample data this must be false.

sal_meter_input_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For current proxy sample data this must be false.

cais_compliance_claim_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For public helper files this must be false.
